name: PostHog
description: PostHog is an open-source product analytics platform. Track events, analyze user behavior, run experiments, manage feature flags, and view session recordings through a comprehensive API.

capabilities.name: capture_event
capabilities.description: Capture a custom analytics event with properties and user identification.

capabilities.name: query_insights
capabilities.description: Query analytics insights with trends, funnels, and retention analysis.

capabilities.name: manage_feature_flags
capabilities.description: Create, update, and evaluate feature flags for controlled rollouts.

capabilities.name: list_persons
capabilities.description: List and search identified users with their properties and events.

capabilities.name: get_events
capabilities.description: Retrieve recent events with filtering by event type and properties.

capabilities.name: manage_experiments
capabilities.description: Create and manage A/B test experiments with variant configuration.
